name: Lemon Sponge Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar together until well combined.
2. Add egg yolks to the mixture and beat until smooth.
3. Gradually add flour, salt, lemon juice, and grated rind. Mix until just combined.
4. Gently fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites into the batter.
5. Pour the batter into an unbaked pie shell.
6. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes.
